commit.message:
8383905: AArch64: Improve code generation for long vector multiply

JDK-8341137 [1] optimized x86 long vector multiply when operands are
derived from 32-bit values. This change applies the same optimization to
AArch64.

Current implementation on AArch64:
**NEON**: use `umov + umov + general-purpose mul` instructions.
**SVE**: use the SVE `mul` instruction.

This PR optimizes them as:
**NEON**: `xtn + xtn + smull/umull`.
**SVE2**: `umullb/smullb`
for better performance.

**SVE1** is not touched because `umullb/smullb` instructions are only
available on SVE2 and the change to NEON is not better than the original
SVE `mul` instruction on SVE1.

This PR delivers up to **3.29x** and **1.85x** performance improvements
to the following JMH benchmarks on NEON and SVE2, respectively.

On a Nvidia Grace (Neoverse-V2) machine with 128-bit SVE2:
```
Benchmark	        SIZE	Unit	Before	Error	After	Error	Uplift
test_bm_pattern1	1024	ops/ms	3282.10	6.36	5866.81	40.39	1.79
test_bm_pattern1	2048	ops/ms	1631.64	1.78	2976.86	3.20	1.82
test_bm_pattern1	4096	ops/ms	818.54	3.52	1486.92	1.75	1.82
test_bm_pattern2	1024	ops/ms	4774.31	5.82	5641.21	7.18	1.18
test_bm_pattern2	2048	ops/ms	2408.53	1.85	2854.08	2.93	1.18
test_bm_pattern2	4096	ops/ms	1207.14	0.91	1430.42	1.52	1.18
test_bm_pattern3	1024	ops/ms	3259.60	0.81	5944.60	11.71	1.82
test_bm_pattern3	2048	ops/ms	1625.23	2.30	2995.87	3.05	1.84
test_bm_pattern3	4096	ops/ms	809.94	1.08	1493.71	4.84	1.84
test_bm_pattern4	1024	ops/ms	4781.61	11.46	5635.32	4.09	1.18
test_bm_pattern4	2048	ops/ms	2408.02	1.04	2853.31	3.10	1.18
test_bm_pattern4	4096	ops/ms	1206.62	0.94	1427.33	1.33	1.18
test_bm_pattern5	1024	ops/ms	3935.10	19.60	3786.73	0.54	0.96
test_bm_pattern5	2048	ops/ms	1964.28	10.39	1882.34	5.31	0.96
test_bm_pattern5	4096	ops/ms	978.99	11.13	951.17	0.06	0.97
test_bm_pattern6	1024	ops/ms	3253.90	4.35	5949.43	10.01	1.83
test_bm_pattern6	2048	ops/ms	1624.97	2.24	2996.06	3.58	1.84
test_bm_pattern6	4096	ops/ms	808.62	0.19	1494.65	1.88	1.85
```

On a Nvidia Grace (Neoverse-V2) machine with `-XX:UseSVE=0`:
```
Benchmark        	SIZE	Unit	Before	Error	After	Error	Uplift
test_bm_pattern1	1024	ops/ms	1228.04	4.64	3543.09	3.35	2.89
test_bm_pattern1	2048	ops/ms	612.20	0.29	1802.66	10.42	2.94
test_bm_pattern1	4096	ops/ms	306.63	0.19	895.87	5.69	2.92
test_bm_pattern2	1024	ops/ms	1212.50	2.73	3562.24	19.94	2.94
test_bm_pattern2	2048	ops/ms	609.39	5.09	1773.17	0.62	2.91
test_bm_pattern2	4096	ops/ms	310.32	0.67	885.59	0.53	2.85
test_bm_pattern3	1024	ops/ms	1132.54	2.19	3703.15	2.98	3.27
test_bm_pattern3	2048	ops/ms	568.37	0.36	1858.72	0.34	3.27
test_bm_pattern3	4096	ops/ms	282.55	0.12	929.76	0.46	3.29
test_bm_pattern4	1024	ops/ms	1206.26	2.73	3562.54	16.33	2.95
test_bm_pattern4	2048	ops/ms	590.92	6.34	1768.44	0.97	2.99
test_bm_pattern4	4096	ops/ms	306.64	2.69	883.83	0.57	2.88
test_bm_pattern5	1024	ops/ms	1220.00	3.19	2891.94	16.00	2.37
test_bm_pattern5	2048	ops/ms	607.81	0.72	1449.05	6.99	2.38
test_bm_pattern5	4096	ops/ms	306.70	0.88	728.73	0.35	2.38
test_bm_pattern6	1024	ops/ms	1131.96	1.26	3705.68	4.07	3.27
test_bm_pattern6	2048	ops/ms	569.26	0.59	1858.87	0.45	3.27
test_bm_pattern6	4096	ops/ms	282.94	0.15	930.71	0.42	3.29
```

This PR also adds the corresponding tests for the changes. All tests
(tier1, tier2, and tier3) passed in NEON, SVE1, and SVE2 environments.

[1] https://bugs.openjdk.org/browse/JDK-8341137
